Usage:
  circleci context get <context-id> [flags]

Examples:
# Get a context by UUID
$ circleci context get ctx-uuid-here

# Output as JSON
$ circleci context get ctx-uuid-here --json

# Get just the org ID
$ circleci context get ctx-uuid-here --json | jq -r '.org_id'


Flags:
      --jq string   Process values from the response using jq syntax
      --json        Output as JSON

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
